raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Legislature has unanimously approved Assembly Bill 2941 to ensure that victims of wildfires and other natural disasters have continued access to health care.",
    "Health plans and health insurers would be required to provide access to medically necessary health care services to patients who have been displaced by a Governor-declared state of emergency.",
    "The bill could authorize care to be provided by an out-of-network provider.",
    "The bill could extend filing deadlines for claims related to health care services.",
    "The bill could suspend prescription refill limitations for displaced individuals.",
    "The bill could allow prescriptions to be refilled at an out-of-network pharmacy.",
    "The bill could relax time limits for referrals to health care services.",
    "The bill could allow for medical equipment or supplies to be replaced for those affected by disasters.",
    "AB 2941 recognizes the importance of consistent health care coverage for patients with chronic conditions."
  ]
}
```
